features: TIMELESSLY FEMININE Lively and radiant, Born Lovely’s aromatic Amber Floral blend is a curated cocktail of lush florals, sparkling fruits, and elegant, clean woods that dries into an elegant yet invigorating finish

CELEBRATE YOUR INNER BEAUTY Born Lovely arrives with notes of Mandarin, Peony and Cassis, easing to a heart of Blushing Freesia, Honeysuckle and Orange Blossom, and drying to a musk of Patchouli, Cedarwood, and Caramel

LOVELY WITH A TWIST Born Lovely arrives in a re-imagined design of the classic Lovely release Adorned with a pink grosgrain bow and capped with clear glass, Born Lovely is a charming addition to your nightstand or perfume collection

BEAUTIFUL, RARE, AND ALWAYS UNEXPECTED A connoisseur of fragrance, the iconic actress and designer Sarah Jessica Parker’s expansion into the world of perfume has yielded a world of enticing and highly curated fragrances
description: Product Description Sarah Jessica Parker - actor, producer, businesswoman, and designer - has been fascinated with and enamored by scent since she was a young girl, so the step to develop a fragrance collection was an obvious one. In 2005, SJP released her first signature fragrance, LOVELY. Over a decade later, LOVELY remains a top seller globally, and has become a go-to scent for women of all ages, everywhere. In the years to follow, SJP has remained on top of the market, expanding her fragrance collection and crafting a wide range of perfumes, body mists, and self-care products. Directions Fragrance reacts to heat, and applying to your pulse points can help release scent throughout the day. Try spritzing the nape of your neck, insides of your elbows, wrists, or the back of your knees. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. See more
